IOU Sustainability and Innovation Center –  Development and Investment Bank of Türkiye Collaboration

MENU

IOU Sustainability and Innovation Center – Development and Investment Bank of Türkiye Collaboration

Under the leadership of the Sustainability and Innovation Center (SIM), Sustainability Cooperation Protocol was signed between our university and the Development and Investment Bank of Türkiye. The ceremony was attended by Mr. Bekir OKAN, Chairman of the Board of Trustees of our University,

, our Rector, Mr.

İbrahim ÖZTOP

, General Manager of the Development and Investment Bank of Türkiye, and

, Deputy General Manager.

With our cooperation, we will create impact and benefit in many different areas such as climate-friendly campus practices, social impact studies, research and development activities for climate change prevention and adaptation, gender equality, energy, water and waste management. 🌎
